name: LeadFX Inc.
description: LeadFX Inc., formerly known as Ivernia Inc., is a mineral resources company based in Canada that focuses on the acquisition, development, and operation of lead-silver-zinc mining projects. Founded in 2000, the company has historically concentrated its efforts on advancing mining assets to production. While it has maintained corporate headquarters in Ontario, Canada, the company has managed international mining operations, specifically in Australia. LeadFX is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol LFX, positioning itself as a player in the base metals sector with a strategic emphasis on lead and silver resource development.
